questions.q: On April 16, 2026, over 100 writers walked out of which historic French publishing house in protest of its conservative billionaire owner, Vincent Bolloré?

A controversial April 2026 investigation questioned the true authorship of Woody Brown's bestselling debut novel 'Upward Bound,' as the minimally speaking author uses what highly disputed communication method?
Unveiled for the first time in April 2026 to mark the book's centenary, newly discovered preliminary pencil sketches of Winnie-the-Pooh were drawn by which original illustrator?

An April 2026 report highlighting the mass sale of AI-generated books compared the trend to George Orwell's '1984' and specifically noted thousands of Amazon titles had been 'polished' by which AI writing tool?
On April 16, 2026, the American Library Association announced that Robert Inman won the W.Y. Boyd Literary Novel Award for military fiction for which novel?
